limn: verb. To draw or paint; to delineate.

lin: verb. To desist, to stop, to cease.
lira: noun. The basic unit of currency in Turkey.
main: adjective. Of chief or leading importance; prime, principal.
manic: adjective. Characterized by mania or craziness; wicked.
mar: verb. To spoil; to ruin; to scathe; to damage.

mil: noun. An angular mil, a unit of angular measurement equal to ⁄ 6400 of a complete circle.

nail: noun. The thin, horny plate at the ends of fingers and toes on humans, chimpanzees and some other animals.
narc: noun. A police officer or federal agent assigned to or engaging in illegal narcotics control.
rail: noun. A horizontal bar extending between supports and used for support or as a barrier; a railing.
rain: noun. Condensed water falling from a cloud.
